tasks.title: Extend RuntimeAdapter with readFile, homedir, configDir
tasks.description: Add readFile, homedir, configDir to RuntimeAdapter interface. Implement in Node adapter. Update test adapter with injectable stubs.

tasks.title: Implement config file discovery with XDG search paths
tasks.description: Config discovery module: search XDG_CONFIG_HOME, ~/.config, cwd for app config files. JSON loader built-in.

tasks.title: Add --config global flag to CLIBuilder
tasks.description: Global --config flag that overrides config file discovery path. Wire into resolution chain.

tasks.title: Add plugin hook for config format loaders (YAML/TOML)
tasks.description: Plugin interface for registering custom config file format loaders (e.g. YAML, TOML).

tasks.title: Implement flag.custom(parseFn) with return type inference
tasks.description: New flag kind: custom(parseFn). Parse function takes string, returns T. Return type inferred from parseFn.

tasks.title: Implement .deprecated() modifier with help/parse warnings
tasks.description: Add .deprecated() to FlagBuilder and ArgBuilder. Shows warning on stderr when used, annotates help text.
